issue_title: filter strictness doesn't appear to work on edge
issue_body_preview:
the blocked results are the exact same number with no strictness or 100% 
used "porn" as the search term on google images 
model: mobilenet v1.1
filter effect didn't seem to have any impact on the end results, stayed the same number of blocked elements no matter what.
test_description_zh: 在 Edge 浏览器中安装扩展后，打开扩展设置页面，将过滤严格度分别设置为不同级别（如 0% 和 100%），然后在 Google 图片中搜索包含 NSFW 内容的关键词，观察每次设置下被屏蔽的图片数量是否有变化。
expected_result_zh: 调整过滤严格度后，屏蔽的图片数量应随严格度的提高而增多、随严格度的降低而减少，不同严格度级别下屏蔽结果应有明显差异。
